scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/contentScript.js --target browser && terser dist/contentScript.js -o dist/contentScript.js -c passes=3,dead_code=true,drop_console=true,drop_debugger=true -m toplevel=true && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r assets dist/
scripts.util:check: STATUS=0; bun run util:format || STATUS=1; bun run util:lint || STATUS=1; bun run util:types || STATUS=1; bun test --concurrent || STATUS=1; exit $STATUS
